creator: ecrist@secure-computing.net
text:
The scaling done in the port Makefile is exactly what's done by the =
Freeswitch developers when they roll out their audio files.  For that =
reason, I've chosen to leave the port the way it is.

That being said, when I next update the port, we will not be using sox =
to scale the audio, and will just be pulling all the various bitrates =
from the Freeswitch server, instead, with an option to scale being =
presented, for those not wanting to use bandwidth.  At that time I may =
offer the option.

Eric Crist


On Aug 3, 2011, at 11:20:18, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of audio/freeswitch-sounds,
>=20
> Please note that PR ports/159419 has just been submitted.
>=20
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>=20
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/159419
>=20
> --=20
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>=20
